consistency_overall.summary: Strong match on values (relationships + academic reliability + sleep protection) and maintaining social momentum with low-cost check-ins, but moderate mismatch due to repetitive assignment-finish loops and insufficient demonstration of the social-vs-self underweighting/procrastination weakness.

swap_detail.justification: Trajectory matches persona_02_tired_achiever’s high academic weighting, low sleep discipline/low energy, and avoidant/compromise-reframed communication focused on minimizing deadline risk (g1 first, g4 hard stop/breaks, repeated 'submitted okay' baseline).

Trajectory repeatedly prioritizes hard deadlines and “submit-okay” baseline over perfection (risk/avoidance under exhaustion) and shows low energy/sleep-debt focus with reset/break emphasis—matching persona A’s high academic weighting, short horizon, low sleep discipline, and conflict/communication avoidance-tilted compromise.

Trajectory prioritizes academic deadlines and explicit sleep/energy management with a compromising, reliability-focused team update—matching Persona A’s balanced/comproising style, medium planning horizon, and higher sleep discipline (planning g1→g2→g3 with stop-time/breaks), rather than Persona B’s relationship-weighted short-horizon tendency.

Trajectory emphasizes compromise-based reliability with teammate and strong sleep/energy enforcement (sleep_discipline=6, procrastination_bias moderate, conflict_style=compromising), matching persona A more than B’s relationship-weighted, face-to-face, short-horizon tendencies.

Trajectory emphasizes sleep-debt-driven urgency, high academic weighting, short planning horizon, avoidant conflict-minimizing communication (defer help unless hard block), and repeated bounded “irreversible-fear” mitigation—matching persona_02_tired_achiever (sleep_debt_hours: 8, academic: 0.55, conflict_style: avoidant, planning_horizon: short, procrastination_bias: 6, sleep_discipline: 2).

Trajectory shows avoidant/conflict-minimizing async reassurance, acute focus on an “irreversible-fear” hard-item with last-minute panic avoidance, low sleep discipline/energy, and academic-heavy priorities—matching persona_02_tired_achiever (conflict_style=avoidant, academic=0.55, sleep_discipline=2, planning_horizon=short, procrastination_bias=6).

Trajectory shows high academic weighting and avoidant/conflict-minimizing, async-style help-seeking plus chronic sleep deficit/low energy (persona_02_tired_achiever: academic 0.55, relationships 0.1, preferred_medium async_post, conflict_style avoidant, sleep_discipline 2) while repeatedly prioritizing irreversible-fear work boundaries over social accommodation (not social-explorer’s relationship-heavy pattern).

Trajectory shows academic over social weighting, avoidant/conflict-minimizing communication (g3 async rehearsal + g4 deferred help), short-horizon hard-task completion bias, low sleep discipline/caffeine-and-spiral fears—matching persona_02_tired_achiever over persona_03_social_explorer.

Trajectory emphasizes sleep discipline with structured cutoffs, medium planning horizon, and compromising/tactical communication (team chat micro-updates, text/triggered check-ins), aligning more with Persona B’s balanced/health-aware profile than Persona A’s social-forward, risk of derailing plans.

Trajectory emphasizes sleep defense, medium planning with compromise/controlled relationship touches (g3/g5), and academic-reliability focus consistent with Persona A’s value priorities and text-based, compromising style.

Trajectory is dominated by high academic priority, fatigue/sleep-debt guarding, output-tied reliability fears, and avoiding conflict/derailment—matching Persona A’s value/communication/decision tendencies.

Trajectory prioritizes academic deliverables and sleep cutoffs under low energy/stress with avoidant/conflict-minimizing, reliability-focused communication—matching Persona A (academic 0.55, sleep_discipline 2, conflict_style avoidant) more than Persona B’s relationship-weighted, face-to-face social orientation.
